query: ALTER TABLE establishments ADD COLUMN planType ENUM('trial', 'basic', 'pro', 'enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial'; ALTER TABLE establishments ADD COLUMN trialStartDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP; ALTER TABLE establishments ADD COLUMN trialDays INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 15;
